name: Intervals.icu MCP Server
what_it_does: Intervals.icu MCP server enabling AI agents to access Intervals.icu athletic training data — fetching workout history, analyzing training load and fitness metrics (ATL, CTL, TSS), accessing power and heart rate data, and integrating Intervals.icu's cycling and endurance sport analytics into agent-driven training analysis workflows.
use_cases: Analyzing training load and fitness trends from training optimization agents
Fetching workout history and performance data from performance analysis agents
Monitoring recovery metrics and stress balance from training planning agents
Building AI-powered training recommendations from coaching agents
Tracking cycling and running performance over time from progress tracking agents
Integrating Intervals.icu data into training planning workflows
not_for: Real-time race telemetry (historical training data focus)
best_when: An endurance athlete or coach using Intervals.icu needs AI assistance analyzing training data — combining Intervals.icu metrics with LLM reasoning for training optimization.
avoid_when: You don't use Intervals.icu, or need real-time race analytics rather than training trend analysis.

auth.notes: Intervals.icu API key required. Generate from Intervals.icu account settings. Community MCP from individual developer.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Intervals.icu: free for athletes with basic features
pricing.paid_tiers: Intervals.icu donor tier: $2+/month for advanced features
pricing.notes: Intervals.icu is free with optional donation tier. API access included. MCP server is free open source.

performance.rate_limits: Intervals.icu API: reasonable limits for personal use

known_agent_gotchas: Intervals.icu API documentation is community-maintained — not all endpoints documented
Training metrics (ATL, CTL, TSS) require domain knowledge to interpret correctly
Community MCP from individual developer — limited ongoing maintenance
Personal health/fitness data — handle with appropriate privacy care
API response format may change with Intervals.icu platform updates
Data quality depends on what athletes have uploaded (Strava sync, Garmin, etc.)
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. API key required — store securely. Community MCP. Personal fitness data — treat with privacy care. GDPR applies (EU-based platform).

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. API key auth. Personal health data — privacy-sensitive. Community MCP. GDPR applicable.
